children.name: p
children.textContent: Security wait at Terminal A is now 28 min — 8 min longer than estimated.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Your gate changed from B18 to B24. Return timing still safe.

children.textContent: Metro Line 2 running on schedule. Coffee stop confirmed feasible.

children.textContent: Heavy traffic on Autobahn A5 — consider metro instead of taxi for return.
